title: dah950's customized Toad Head pack
description: This is a fork of the Toad Head modpack with extra mods that the user & creator of the server, dah950, likes. Recommended for more advanced users on the Toad Head server.
body:
This is the recommended modpack for the Toad Head server. You can still use Vanilla if you would like, but we would recommend you use this modpack or the base Toad Head one. This modpack is essentially Optifine on steroids with a few extra optimization mods. There are some more advanced mods that the creator of the server, dah950, prefers to use.

Our website is [www.toadhead.net](https://www.toadhead.net/)

The Toad Head website is WIP

Icon is made by [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org)
